AssessorLevel.description: Certification ladder (Methodology §9). High-stakes ratings require CERTIFIED_LEAD.
AssessorLevel.title: AssessorLevel

description:
The accumulated ladder evidence for one advisor (`owner_consultant_id`). The advisor's LEVEL
is on their consultant record (and JWT); this holds the evidence promotions are gated on.

observed_lead_signoff_by.description: The Certified Lead who signed off the observed lead.
observed_lead_signoff_by.title: Observed Lead Signoff By

owner_consultant_id.description: The consultant who owns this resource. Data scoping is by this field, enforced in the repository layer and tested from day one.
owner_consultant_id.title: Owner Consultant Id

title: CertificationRecord
